sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58724" key="kolpwto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολπ-ωτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n58724.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">formed into folds</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χιτῶνες</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.173c</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κολπωτὰν ὀθόναισι . . τρόπιν ἰθύνεσκον</foreign> with <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">swelling</tr_> sails, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Hymn.Is.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">153</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
